Main.title: rustler_precompiled
Main.content: Make the usage of precompiled NIFs easier for projects using Rustler

Main.title: rustler
Main.content: Mix compiler and runtime helpers for Rustler.

Main.title: mjml
Main.content: Responsive emails made easy. NIF bindings for the MJML Rust implementation (mrml)

Main.title: cargo
Main.content: Erlang wrapper for Rust's cargo build tool

Main.title: rebar3_cargo
Main.content: A rebar plugin to build Rust crates

Main.title: ex_keccak
Main.content: NIF library for computing Keccak SHA3-256 hashes using tiny-keccak Rust crate.

Main.title: jsonrs
Main.content: A fully-featured and performant JSON library powered by Rust

Main.title: ammoniex
Main.content: Elixir wrapper for Rust HTML sanitizing library ammonia

Main.title: ex_secp256k1
Main.content: Rust Nif that wraps functions from the libsecp256k1 Rust library.

Main.title: igniter_js
Main.content: Javascript codemods, powered by a high-performance Rust parser integrated via NIFs

Main.title: makeup_syntect
Main.content: Language lexers for Makeup using the syntect Rust library

Main.title: aho_corasearch
Main.content: Elixir lib for Aho-Corasick string searching. Uses a Rust-based NIF for greatly improved performance.

Main.title: spreadsheet
Main.content: Fast, memory-efficient Elixir library for parsing spreadsheet files (.xls, .xlsx, .xlsm, .xlsb, .ods) powered by Rust and Calamine. Features precompiled NIFs, smart type handling, and support for hidden sheets.

Main.title: rrule
Main.content: Elixir wrapper for Rust based RRule parsing

Main.title: extractous_ex
Main.content: Elixir library for extracting text and metadata from various document formats using the Extractous Rust library

Main.title: vega_lite_convert
Main.content: Elixir bindings to Rust vl-convert library

Main.title: oxc
Main.content: Elixir bindings for the OXC JavaScript toolchain — parse, transform, minify, and bundle JS/TS via Rust NIFs.

Main.title: aho_corasick_search
Main.content: Elixir lib for Aho-Corasick string searching. Uses a Rust-based NIF for greatly improved performance.

Main.title: aho_corasick_nif
Main.content: Aho-Corasick string matching algorithm implemented as a NIF wrapper of the Rust crate aho-corasick

Main.title: ex_brotli
Main.content: Elixir wrapper for Rust based brotli compression

Main.title: ex_pbkdf2
Main.content: Pbkdf2 for Elixir by a Rust-based NIF

Main.title: reckon_db
Main.content: BEAM-native Event Store built on Khepri/Ra with Raft consensus. Event sourcing, persistent subscriptions, snapshots, and automatic cluster formation via UDP multicast discovery. Ships embedded Rust NIFs for 3-15x acceleration of crypto, hashing, compression, aggregation, filter matching, and graph algorithms — with pure-Erlang fallbacks when the toolchain isn't available.

Main.title: fast_eip_55
Main.content: Faster Rust Keccak implementation of EIP-55. Encode and validate an Ethereum address against EIP-55 checksum in Elixir.

Main.title: htmd
Main.content: A fast HTML to Markdown converter for Elixir, powered by Rust.

Main.title: bloom_filter_ex
Main.content: Simple Bloom Filter wrapping the fastbloom Rust crate

Main.title: excoding
Main.content: String encoding/decoding NIF using rust [encoding](https://crates.io/crates/encoding) library

Main.title: xlsx_writer
Main.content: A fast Elixir library for writing Excel (.xlsx) files using Rust. Built with the rust_xlsxwriter crate via Rustler NIF for high performance spreadsheet generation.

Main.title: metamorphic_crypto
Main.content: NaCl-compatible encryption for Elixir with ML-KEM-512/768/1024 post-quantum support. Precompiled Rust NIFs — no C compiler or system packages needed.

Main.title: ex_h3o
Main.content: Elixir bindings for h3o, a Rust implementation of the H3 geospatial indexing system

Main.title: ex_ratatui
Main.content: Elixir bindings for the Rust ratatui terminal UI library

Main.title: lingua
Main.content: An Elixir wrapper around the Rust Lingua language detection library.

Main.title: fast_rss
Main.content: Fast Elixir RSS feed parser, a NIF wrapper around the Rust RSS crate

Main.title: liter_llm
Main.content: Universal LLM API client with Rust-powered polyglot bindings.

Main.title: rebar3_rustler
Main.content: Create new rustler-based Erlang NIF libs in no time

Main.title: vize
Main.content: Elixir bindings for the Vize Vue.js toolchain — compile, lint, and format Vue SFCs via Rust NIFs.

Main.title: rbt_weave
Main.content: Graph conflict detection and image processing NIFs for OSINT knowledge graphs, powered by Rust.

Main.title: wireguardex
Main.content: An Elixir library for configuring WireGuard interfaces via NIFs in Rust

Main.title: postal
Main.content: Elixir bindings for libpostal — fast address parsing and normalization via Rust NIF

Main.title: blake3
Main.content: Elixir binding for the Rust Blake3 implementation

Main.title: dprint_markdown_formatter
Main.content: A fast, configurable markdown formatter for Elixir using Rust's dprint-plugin-markdown

Main.title: timeless_metrics
Main.content: Embedded time series database for Elixir with a Rust-native hot path.

Main.title: rox
Main.content: Rust powered NIF bindings to Facebook's RocksDB

Main.title: qrusty
Main.content: QR Code library that leverages precompiled Rust

Main.title: yaml_rustler
Main.content: Fast YAML parsing using Rust's yaml-rust2 via Rustler

Main.title: rustq
Main.content: Rust templates and quasiquoting for Elixir

Main.title: xqlite
Main.content: An Elixir SQLite database library utilising the rusqlite Rust crate

Main.title: ex_monty
Main.content: Elixir NIF wrapper for Monty, a minimal secure Python interpreter written in Rust

Main.title: argon2id_elixir
Main.content: Argon2 password hashing using Rust

Main.title: umya_spreadsheet_ex
Main.content: Elixir NIF wrapper for the umya-spreadsheet Rust library, providing Excel (.xlsx) file manipulation capabilities.

Main.title: mermex
Main.content: Fast Mermaid diagram to SVG rendering via native Rust NIF

Main.title: cloaked_req
Main.content: Req adapter around Rust wreq with browser impersonation support

Main.title: pdf_redlines
Main.content: Fast PDF redline extraction via a Rust NIF (MuPDF).

Main.title: rhai_rustler
Main.content: Rhai rustler bindings

Main.title: spikard
Main.content: Rust-centric multi-language HTTP framework with polyglot bindings

Main.title: doc_redlines
Main.content: Fast .doc redline extraction via a Rust NIF.

Main.title: reed_solomon_ex
Main.content: Elixir/Rust wrapper around Reed-Solomon error correction code library. Suitable for protecting short binary packets against bit errors on noisy channels.

Main.title: xxh3
Main.content: NIF bindings for XXH3 hash functions implemented in Rust

Main.title: sidereon
Main.content: Satellite toolkit for Elixir with SGP4 propagation, coordinate transforms, GNSS positioning, orbit determination, conjunction assessment, pass prediction, and a Rust NIF backend.

Main.title: dominant_colors
Main.content: Extract dominant colors from given image (using kmeans), wrapper on top of rust kmeans_colors.

Main.title: ex_mgrs
Main.content: Elixir library for converting between latitude/longitude coordinates and MGRS (Military Grid Reference System) coordinates using embedded Rust geoconvert library.

Main.title: sied
Main.content: High-performance SIMD operations for Erlang via Rust NIF using Rustler

Main.title: ex_pdfium
Main.content: Elixir NIF wrapper for pdfium — Google's Chromium PDF engine — via the Rust pdfium-render crate, shipped as a precompiled binary

Main.title: pcap_file_ex
Main.content: High-performance Elixir library for reading and parsing PCAP and PCAPNG network capture files with Rust NIF implementation.

Main.title: image_tools
Main.content: A set of simple image tools like rotate an image implemented in Rust

Main.title: lumenmail
Main.content: A Gleam library for sending emails via SMTP, inspired by the Rust mail-send crate

Main.title: ex_bashkit
Main.content: Elixir NIF wrapper for bashkit, a sandboxed virtual bash interpreter written in Rust

Main.title: optify
Main.content: Configuration options management powered by Rust NIFs. Merges feature-flagged JSON/YAML configs with deep-merge semantics.

Main.title: oxide
Main.content: Helpers for working with result tuples, inspired by Rust.

Main.title: human_name
Main.content: Elixir bindings for the human-name crate implemented as a safe Rust NIF.

Main.title: ex_rstar
Main.content: Elixir NIF wrapper around the Rust rstar R*-tree spatial index. Provides efficient 2D and 3D nearest-neighbor, envelope, and radius queries with optional associated data per point. 3D support enables ECEF and point cloud use cases.

Main.title: duskmoon_oxc
Main.content: Duskmoon fork of OXC Elixir bindings — parse, transform, minify, and bundle JS/TS via Rust NIFs.

Main.title: duskmoon_vize
Main.content: Duskmoon fork of Vize Elixir bindings — compile, lint, and format Vue SFCs via Rust NIFs.

Main.title: dave
Main.content: Discord DAVE protocol for Elixir, backed by Rust NIF bindings to davey

Main.title: sorted_set_nif
Main.content: SortedSet is a fast and efficient Rust backed sorted set.

Main.title: ex_jsonschema
Main.content: High-performance JSON Schema validation for Elixir using Rust

Main.title: ex_cubecl
Main.content: ExCubecl is a GPU compute runtime for Elixir powered by CubeCL via Rust NIFs. Provides GPU buffer management, kernel execution, async command submission, and pipeline orchestration. Currently includes CPU fallback implementations.

Main.title: rustyjson
Main.content: Ultra-fast JSON encoding/decoding for Elixir. A drop-in Jason replacement that's 2-3x faster with 2-4x less memory, plus key interning for up to 2x faster bulk decoding. Full RFC 8259 compliance and memory safety. Purpose-built Rust NIFs, no serde.

Main.title: fastest_tiktoken
Main.content: Fast Elixir bindings for the pure-Rust tiktoken crate

Main.title: calque
Main.content: A simple snapshot testing library inspired by Birdie (Gleam) and Insta (Rust).

Main.title: rolyrine
Main.content: Fast polyline encoding/decoding powered by Rust

Main.title: makeup_rust
Main.content: Rust lexer for Makeup

Main.title: nulid
Main.content: Nanosecond-Precision Universally Lexicographically Sortable Identifier (NULID) for Elixir, powered by Rust NIF.

Main.title: rrule_ext
Main.content: Elixir wrapper for Rust based RRule parsing, extending on the rrule elixir library

Main.title: mdex_mermex
Main.content: An MDEx plugin that renders Mermaid diagrams server-side using Mermex (Rust NIF)

Main.title: rusty_csv
Main.content: Ultra-fast CSV parsing for Elixir. A purpose-built Rust NIF with SIMD acceleration, parallel parsing, and bounded-memory streaming. Drop-in NimbleCSV replacement.

Main.title: gleedoc
Main.content: A doc test library for Gleam, inspired by Rust and Elixir's doctest tooling.

Main.title: pdf_elixide
Main.content: Elixir bindings for pdf_oxide, a high-performance PDF library written in Rust.

Main.title: captcha_nif
Main.content: NIF bindings for the captcha Rust implementation

Main.title: astrodynamics
Main.content: Elixir bindings for the astrodynamics Rust crate with precompiled NIF support.

Main.title: jsonld_ex
Main.content: A JSON-LD library for Elixir, providing a Rust-based implementation for performance.

Main.title: xler
Main.content: A rust-based Excel parser.

Main.title: arpabex
Main.content: Elixir NIF wrapper of Rust Arpabet phoneme prediction library

Main.title: midiex
Main.content: A cross-platform, realtime MIDI processing in Elixir library which wraps the midir Rust library.

Main.title: vodozemac
Main.content: Elixir bindings to Matrix's Olm and Megolm primitives via Element's vodozemac (Rust) — the successor to the deprecated libolm.

Main.title: html_minifier
Main.content: An Elixir package that minifies HTML using Rust.

Main.title: spirit_fingers
Main.content: Fast SimHash NIFs written in Rust 🐇💨 as Erlang/Elixir versions were too slow 🐢

Main.title: gauc
Main.content: Elxir Wrapper for Gauc - Rust Wrapper for Couchbase

Main.title: arrays_rrb_vector
Main.content: An `Arrays` implementation based on a set of NIFs (Natively Implemented Functions) written in Rust. The internal representation of the array is known as a 'Relaxed Radix Balanced Vector', provided by the Rust `im` library. Performance is unfortunately overshadowed by NIF-calling overhead.

Main.title: rustler_btleplug
Main.content: Elixir library providing Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) client functionality through a Rustler NIF. Uses the btleplug crate to scan for, connect to, and interact with BLE peripherals. POC basic functionality and only client (central) mode is supported resp. usable currently.

Main.title: elixirkit
Main.content: Run Elixir from Rust/Tauri apps and exchange messages over PubSub.
